components.label: Untimely responses

components.label: Closed without relief

components.label: Issue concentration

summary: Between 2025-01-01 and 2026-06-29, the CFPB published 878 complaints about Wells Fargo. Volume is steady (last 3 months averaged 44 per month versus 50 before). The most common issue is "Managing an account" (29% of complaints), concentrated in checking or savings account. The company responded on time to 97% of cases; 64.4% of closed cases ended without relief. Overall risk signal: Moderate (38/100). This is an exploratory signal from public complaint data, not a regulatory, legal, or investment conclusion.
